subject: Re:
body:
sergey is leaving on the 2.. what is best then is for Larry to get you early on the first,, pick up sergey and ann, , return them that night. 

----- Original Message ----
From: Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com>
To: "Epstein, Jeffrey" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, December 30, 2006 6:28:43 PM
Subject: 

Ok, so here is the final - leaving 1st - he'd like to dept out of St T which means going there by chopper - he'd leave latest possible which would be wheels up at 6 w/his plane to SD..this to avoid all the shit and waste of time clearing into st martin and then clearing into st thomas so I'd like it if larry could come and get me afternnon 1st - if not then I'll fly into st t on his plane...
I'll ask anne and sergey to come over 2nd for lunch and go and get them
Re richardson trip - check out Pat e mail to me which I have forwarded to you. TW I don't think will do trip..but if you are going to pay for part of the charter then I probably would go w/Pat ..
Ok so that is all - your thoughts plse

G
                




__________________________________________________
